title: 桜花賞の後に・心躍る挑戦

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I greet Air Groove as she returns from her
awe-inspiring performance in the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As expected from the Oka Sho, the competition
was spectacularly fierce.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Races like this truly do set my heart alight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race has just finished, but Air Groove is
ablaze with fighting spirit!
choice_data_list:
You'll need to give even more at the Japanese
Oaks.

You'll need to give even more at the Japanese
Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let's get back. I want to go over today's race and
start strategizing for the Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Oaks is coming up fast. We can't
afford to rest on our laurels!
